title: What Is Castile Soap? Uses, Benefits & Ingredients
meta_description: What is castile soap, what is it made of, and what is it good for? Get the complete guide to castile soap uses, benefits, ingredients, and pH — in plain English.
image_prompt: Editorial photography, a rustic farmhouse kitchen scene centered on the art of traditional soap-making, with a large clear glass mixing bowl containing a creamy white liquid soap batter mid-pour from a ceramic pitcher, set on a worn light oak wooden worktop, accompanied by a small bottle of organic virgin coconut oil with the label visible, a wooden-handled soap stirring spoon resting across the bowl rim, and a single unwrapped round puck-shaped Real Skin Care bar soap with a circular white label and crimped white pleated paper edges sitting naturally to the side as a finished-product reference, the worktop surface showing natural wood grain texture with gentle use marks that feel authentic and lived-in, background softly blurred to suggest a bright airy kitchen with white painted walls and a window letting in warm morning light, lit by soft warm diffused natural window light from the left casting gentle shadows across the bowl and soap bar, photorealistic, 35mm lens, shot on Canon R5, wide landscape crop filling the full frame edge to edge, no letterboxing, no borders.
